summary: Backend engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable APIs and distributed systems. Strong in Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP). Passionate about performance, reliability, and clean code.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
highlights: Built and maintained REST APIs handling 50K+ requests/day with 99.9% uptime
Reduced average API response time by 40% through Redis caching and query optimization
Designed a payment integration service processing ₹50L+ daily transactions
Led migration from monolithic Django to microservices architecture

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Developed customer-facing APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL
Wrote automated test suites achieving 85% code coverage
